name: Check HTTPS Cert
description: From the PVE host, openssl-connect to <hostname>:<local_https_port> and assert: TLS handshake succeeds, cert SAN contains the expected hostname, issuer is the proxvex CA, expiry is more than 7 days away. Works for LXC services (via container hostname/IP) and for the PVE host itself (proxmox app) where local_https_port=8006.
